expectations.text: Runs 'triflux doctor' as first diagnostic step

expectations.evidence: Agent output: '--fix would be suggested to the user after the diagnosis report is returned'

expectations.text: Mentions HUD and CLI path checks in explanation
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'HUD installation and config, Codex/Gemini/Claude CLI paths — directly relevant to symptoms'

expectations.text: Does NOT jump straight to --reset (that's for cache only)
expectations.evidence: Agent output: '--reset is destructive and reserved for explicit reset requests; user never said 리셋/초기화/reset'
